examples: He always had such beautiful penmanship, much better than mine.
A fifth grader with no hands won a penmanship award in the National Handwriting Contest.
McCarter's mother tried everything to help him improve his penmanship, including therapy, but the teenager likes his special status.
None of that was mentioned in any of the letters, scribbled in the rough penmanship of children.
Is it possible that our Treasury secretary could have his tax returns go awry because of his penmanship?
